title: CRM application
description: CRM-inspired mobile application developed during my internship using React Native, Expo, and TypeScript. The app integrates with an existing backend API, where I implemented secure and encrypted data communication. This project gave me hands-on experience working with existing systems, API integration, and building reliable mobile interfaces in a real-world development environment.

title: MiniChat
description: Full-stack real-time messaging application built with React, TypeScript, Node.js/Express, and Supabase. Implemented basic user authentication, WebSocket-based communication, and a live demo mode. The focus was on handling real-time updates, client synchronization, and frontend state management to deliver a responsive user experience without page reloads.

title: InnoviaHub
description: Full-stack office booking and user management app using React and .NET 9.

title: FrienDate
description: A project aiming to help people coordinate schedules and suggest weather-based group activities.

title: SpaMedSpa
description: A React-based app for booking spa treatments, built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

title: FilmStudio
description: A fullstack app for managing film rentals, featuring a custom REST API, authentication, and film inventory management.
